name: agent-md-monorepo

scripts.build:test-deps: npm run build -w @agent-md/schema && npm run build -w @agent-md/parser && npm run build -w @agent-md/resolver && npm run build -w @agent-md/skill
scripts.build: npm run build -w @agent-md/schema && npm run build -w @agent-md/parser && npm run build -w @agent-md/resolver && npm run build -w @agent-md/skill && npm run build -w @agent-md/renderer-react && npm run build -w @agent-md/viewer && npm run build -w agent-md-preview && npm run build -w @abuswami1996/agent-md
scripts.verify: npm run build:test-deps && npm test && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.package:all: npm run package -w agent-md-preview && npm run build -w @abuswami1996/agent-md && npm pack --dry-run -w @abuswami1996/agent-md && npm run ls:vsix -w agent-md-preview

description: Agent Markdown is a local-first Markdown format for building interactive, data-rich documents without asking agents to emit full HTML, custom JavaScript, or bulky application code.
